Governance.description: Decisions defining organizational rules, institutional structure, and foundational constraints.

Strategy.description: Decisions defining direction, priorities, and long-term positioning.

Architecture.description: Decisions defining technical systems, interfaces, and implementation principles.

Operations.description: Decisions defining workflows, execution processes, and coordination methods.

Portfolio.description: Decisions defining resource allocation and priority between initiatives.

Risk.description: Decisions designed to reduce uncertainty or protect strategic alignment.
